calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Phillip Kilduff, Esq., 415-673-0368, specially appearing for plaintiff and moving party United Services Automobile Association

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION'S Notice Of Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600. (302/PJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Aug-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Daniel Maguire, Esq. for Plaintiff: United Services Automobile Assoc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Steve Livingston, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Julia Russell, aka Julia M. Russell, aka Julia M. Villanueva as follows:
Damages $145,450.52
Prejudgment Interest $39,877.68
Costs $495.00, for a total of $185,823.20
Judgment signed in open court.
